name: popover
description: A floating panel anchored to a trigger for rich content shown on click. Non-modal but accessible: moves focus in on open, restores it on close, and dismisses on Escape or an outside click.

notes: The panel is a role=dialog labelled by its title or ariaLabel
The trigger advertises aria-haspopup=dialog and aria-expanded
Focus moves into the panel on open and is restored to the trigger on close
Escape and a click outside dismiss it

intents: a floating panel anchored to a button for rich content
a click-triggered popover with a form or details
show contextual content in an accessible popover
